extortion.description: Caseificio Alta Valsesia is an Italian dairy company renowned for its high-quality cheese production. Located in the picturesque Valsesia region, the company specializes in traditional Italian cheeses such as Toma and Bettelmatt. Committed to artisanal methods and using locally sourced milk, Caseificio Alta Valsesia emphasizes sustainability and preserving regional cheese-making heritage.
